description: Compile capability, case spec, and assets into an executable scene spec with object roles, initial states, collision graph, camera, render requirements, and required signals.
physical_assumptions: Scene spec is an executable contract, not a prose prompt.
Active/passive object roles must survive runtime and verifier artifacts.
Initial velocity belongs in structured fields.
verifier_rules: Scene object ids match case spec.
Camera/render requirements are not hidden in prose.
repair_suggestions: Add missing object roles and stable ids.
Move initial velocities from prompt prose into structured fields.
Record camera and signal requirements in scene spec.
